name: Edible Playdough
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients thoroughly until combined.
2. Optional additions include Rice Krispies Coconut sprinkles, Chocolate chips, Red hots, or Tiny olives.
3. Ensure children wash their hands before handling the dough.
4. Provide a wax paper-covered work surface for them to knead and play with the edible dough.
5. Store any leftover playdough in an airtight container.
